productDisplayName: Nike Men As Elite Ultimate Ss Training Purple T-Shirts
description: CompositionPurple round neck knit t-shirt made of Dri-Fit fabric, with short raglan sleeves, meshed and perforated on the sides with a contrast fabric lining, contrast fabric lining on the shoulders and nike swoosh on right chestFittingComfortWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soaking/remove promptlyLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryDesigned for sporting needs, this nike football t-shirt is made of knit fabric with Dri-Fit technology to offer absolute sweat-free, fresh comfort. Such properties make it ideal not just for playing football, but any sport, and even on a hot day. Team this with performance shorts and sports shoes, or tracks and floaters for unparalleled cool.
